title: ProDec 500ml Flexible Mixing Bowl, Ideal for Mixing Powder Filler, Grout, Plaster, Adhesive, Paint - Durable, Easy Clean Flexible Material with Flat Bottom for Up to 3 inch Filling Knife
features: Handy mixing bowl ideal for mixing up to 500ml of powder fillers, plaster, grout, adhesives, paint and more
Flexible rubber material makes it easy to break up/crack out dried filler ready for next use and easy to clean off any residue with warm water
Ideal for decorators, builders, DIY, arts and crafts
500ml capacity marked by both internal and external graduations for accurate measuring of water
Wide enough at its base for a 3 inch filling knife or filling blade
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint The complete decorating accessories solution from ProDec ProDec has all the tools you need for a trade quality job, from preparation and protection through to application and cleaning up. Brushes Whatever the paint or surface, ProDec has a brush for every situation. From flat brushes to angled brushes, long reach brushes to fine detail brushes, masonry brushes to block brushes, papering brushes to dusting brushes, we've got everything you need for a smooth trade finish. Rollers Cage rollers, mini rollers and double arm rollers are available in a wide range of trade quality fabrics that suit emulsion, masonry, gloss, satin, primer, undercoat, woodstains and more. Rugged frames and sturdy extension poles help you paint quickly and effectively. Tools From scraping to filling, smoothing to caulking, cutting to pasting and much more, ProDec has the tools to help you prepare surfaces before painting and get outstanding results with wallpaper. Tapes ProDec's range of quality masking tapes protect surfaces and give crisp paint lines for a high quality finish, saving time and mess. Standard grades are available for everyday use, low tack grades for delicate surfaces and UV resistant grades for hotspots. Dust sheets & Tarpaulins Our range of cotton and polythene dust sheets, self-adhesive films and barrier sheets keeps floors and furniture protected from spills and splashes during the job and helps minimise dust transfer between working areas. Abrasives Good painting starts with good preparation, and ProDec has everything you need to get your surfaces in tiptop condition. We've got a range of trade quality abrasive papers for sanding, steel wool and wire brushes for cleaning, as well as tack cloths to remove dust. Maintenance Whatever the job, ProDec has all the essentials you need, from wiping to polishing, sweeping up to collecting waste. Our range includes cloths, rags, sponges, brooms, rubble sacks, paint kettles and more. Painters' Workwear ProDec has a wide range of professional decorating workwear, including painters' trousers, shorts and the classic bib & brace. Available in a choice of hardwearing fabrics, they are carefully designed and tailored for a comfortable fit, with multiple storage pockets to keep essential tools close at hand.
